steps.title: Use the story context
steps.content: The uncle says the hardest part of telling a story is finding the beginning. A beginning is one component of a story, so part means a piece or component of the storytelling process.

steps.title: Choose the closest synonym
steps.content: A means a region, B means a tune, and D means a shapeless mass. None fits a component of a story. The closest synonym for a component or constituent piece is the needed word. The answer is C.
